gt_sql: SELECT DISTINCT T2.molecule_id, T1.element FROM atom AS T1 INNER JOIN molecule AS T2 ON T1.molecule_id = T2.molecule_id WHERE T2.label = '+'
pred_sql: SELECT m.molecule_id, a.element FROM molecule m JOIN atom a ON m.molecule_id = a.molecule_id WHERE m.label = '+'
question: List all carcinogenic molecules and their elements.
